data.title: Dar Global and The Trump Organization open $1bn Trump Plaza Jeddah, their third collaboration in Saudi Arabia.
data.description: In JEDDAH, Saudi Arabia, on Jan. 12, 2026, global luxury real estate developer Dar Global (LSE: DAR) revealed the commencement of Trump Plaza Jeddah. This partnership with The Trump Organization in Saudi Arabia is Dar Global's third collaboration with the company.

data.title: Dow Jones futures fall due to criminal probe on Fed chief Powell; JPMorgan, Goldman, Delta, Taiwan Semi in focus.
data.description: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve chairman, mentioned that a criminal investigation primarily stems from President Trump's dissatisfaction with interest rates. Major companies like JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Taiwan Semiconductor, and Delta Air Lines may be affected. As a result, Dow Jones futures have dropped amid the news of Powell being under criminal scrutiny.

data.title: Europe and China make progress on electric vehicle dispute. Car manufacturers can set import limits to avoid tariffs. Potential boost for Volkswagen.
data.description: The European Commission has authorized car manufacturers to choose to comply with self-imposed restrictions on their imports from China rather than facing tariffs. This decision could be advantageous for companies such as Volkswagen, providing them with the flexibility to set their own limits on imports rather than being subject to mandatory tariffs.

data.title: BTQ Technologies launches Bitcoin Quantum Testnet, commemorating 17 years since Bitcoin's inception. Quantum-safe fork using NIST-standardized ML-DSA cryptography. Open participation for miners, developers.
data.description: A significant moment in cryptocurrency history has been reached with the launch of the Bitcoin Quantum testnet. This event comes 17 years after the mining of Bitcoin's very first block by Satoshi Nakamoto. The testnet introduces a quantum-safe Bitcoin fork that utilizes NIST-standardized ML-DSA cryptography. This development allows for enhanced security in the face of quantum computing threats. Open to all, the testnet welcomes miners, developers, and other participants to engage in the project.

data.title: Valour's ETPs saw record net inflows of $138.2 million in 2025, showing strong demand amidst market volatility.
data.description: In 2025, Valour witnessed record net inflows with approximately $138.2 million flowing into its ETPs. This total includes $116.2 million received by the end of Q3 and an additional estimated $22.0 million in Q4. This outstanding achievement illustrates Valour's strong performance and popularity among investors, showcasing significant demand for its products in various market conditions.

data.title: Leeds Equity Partners expands team with 2 promotions and 1 new appointment amid firm growth.
data.description: In a recent press release on January 12, 2026, Leeds Equity Partners, a private equity firm headquartered in New York, revealed the advancement of Olivia Caccia and William Teplitz to the positions of Vice President. Additionally, Danielle Klimchak has been named as the Chief Administrative Officer. These strategic appointments signify a key development within the organization.

data.title: AbbVie and RemeGen sign exclusive deal for RC148, bispecific antibody for solid tumors. Jan. 12. Source: PRNewswire.
data.description: A groundbreaking drug named RC148, which is a PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody, is currently under assessment for various advanced solid tumors, including specific types of lung cancers. On January 12, 2026, a landmark exclusive licensing agreement was struck in North Chicago, Illinois, and Yantai, China, between AbbVie (NYSE: ABBV) and RemeGen. This partnership marks a significant move in the medical field with hopes to bring innovative treatment solutions to patients.

data.title: V2X, Inc. secures SHIELD IDIQ Contract from MDA to support defense system. Jan. 12, 2026. Stock: VVX.
data.description: V2X, Inc., a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol VVX, announced on January 12, 2026, that it has secured a contract from the Missile Defense Agency's (MDA) Scalable Homeland Innovative Enterprise Layered Defense (SHIELD) program. This contract falls under the indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity (IDIQ) contract vehicle.

data.title: PureHealth Research is redefining prostate health supplements with clinical-grade formulations, setting new standards in addressing bladder concerns. From Manassas, they are committed to transparent and clinically-dosed products for overall health.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, in Manassas, Va., PureHealth Research confirmed its dedication to establishing higher benchmarks for top-quality prostate health supplements. They are committed to utilizing transparent, clinically-backed formulations with appropriate dosages to tackle the underlying issues related to common bladder problems.

data.title: Realty Income partners with GIC for $1.5B+ deal, expands to Mexico with $200M commitment for industrial portfolio.
data.description: A joint venture has been established with GIC for a programmatic partnership exceeding $1.5 billion. There are plans to expand operations into Mexico with a commitment of $200 million for a long-term leased industrial portfolio in USD. GIC has made a significant investment in Realty Income's U.S. Core Plus fund. The developments were announced in San Diego on January 12, 2026.

data.title: FPA partners with firms to launch FPAi Authority for members to access AI education, tools. Nearly 50% of Americans prefer advisers knowledgeable in AI.
data.description: In a recent collaboration, the Financial Planning Association (FPA) has joined forces with Capital Investment Advisors and FutureProof Advisor to enhance their knowledge and utilization of artificial intelligence (AI). The initiative, announced on January 12, 2026, aims to cater to the increasing demand for financial advisors who are proficient in AI technologies. Surveys reveal that nearly 50% of Americans prefer to engage with advisors well-versed in leveraging AI for financial planning services.
